auth.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Log in

errors.shortPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.profileMissing: Account was created but your profile is missing. Try again in a moment or contact support.
errors.mfaRequired: Enter your authenticator code to finish signing in.
errors.registerFailed: Could not create your account. Check your details and try again.
errors.loginFailed: Could not sign you in. Check your nickname and password.

one.title: Find the QR codes
one.text: Codes are hidden around the festival. Open the scanner and scan every code you find.

two.title: Collect them all
two.text: Each code unlocks a card with a piece of art and its story. Your finds are saved even without internet.

three.title: Climb the ranking
three.text: The more codes you find, the higher you climb. Sync when you have signal so your finds count.

codes.empty: No codes released yet. Stay tuned!

scan.title: Scan a code
scan.hint: Point the camera at a QR code
scan.noCamera: Camera is not available. Check permissions in your browser settings.
scan.unknownCode: This code does not belong to the hunt.

rank.title: Ranking
rank.hidden: The ranking is currently hidden. Keep hunting!
rank.frozen: Ranking is frozen — final results coming soon!

install.hint: Install for full screen — no browser bar.
install.hintManual: Add to home screen: browser menu → Install app (or Share → Add to Home on iPhone).

avatarCrop.title: Crop avatar
avatarCrop.hint: Drag to position. Pinch or scroll to zoom. Use the slider to rotate.

adminPanel.title: Admin access
adminPanel.hint: Leave player view and return to event management.

cardCrop.title: Crop card artwork
cardCrop.hint: Drag to position. Pinch or scroll to zoom. Use the slider to rotate. Preview matches the print sheet.

lifecycle.notStarted: The hunt has not started yet
lifecycle.thanks: Thanks for playing! Final results will be announced by the organizers.

sync.offlineQueued: Saved on device — will sync when online
